announcement.title: Mid-Semester Assessments Start on April 22
announcement.description: Carry your ID card and arrive at the exam hall at least 15 minutes early.

announcement.title: Library Portal Maintenance Window
announcement.description: The digital library system will be unavailable from 7:00 PM to 9:00 PM.

announcement.title: Project Review Submissions Close This Friday
announcement.description: Upload your final presentation deck and source files before 5:00 PM.
